page_content:
ENEE698 Graduate Seminar (1-3 Credits)

Every semester regular seminars are held in electrical science and in the six areas of specialization offered by the electrical engineering department. They may be taken, by arrangement with the student's advisor, for repeated credit.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

ENEE699 Independent Studies in Electrical Engineering (1-3 Credits) Supervised individual study or project, or supervised group study or project, at an advanced level, in electrical engineering.

Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.
